channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE conducted 37 investigations into officer misconduct in last year
item.description: The disclosure from the agency's acting director came after immigration officers shot two U.S. citizens, intensifying questions about ICE officers' ta...

item.title: DHS expected to shut down as immigration talks falter
item.description: Senate Democrats blocked two Republican-backed measures Thursday to keep the department open, including a short-term funding extension for two weeks a...

item.title: Winter Olympic shocker: American Chloe Kim falls short of halfpipe gold three-peat
item.description: Korea's Gaon Choi, 17, rebounded from a hard fall to win gold — and end her role model's historic bid for three in a row in the Winter Olympic halfpip...

item.title: Ukrainians rally in support of Olympian Vladyslav Heraskevych, banned for his helmet
item.description: Ukrainians are uniting in solidarity with Olympic skeleton racer Vladyslav Heraskevych after he was disqualified for wearing a helmet with images of U...

item.title: What the data tells us about kidnapped people — and how Nancy Guthrie is an outlier
item.description: Nancy Guthrie is among the thousands of people who go missing in the U.S. each year. But experts describe her case as "strange," with many unique deta...

item.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
item.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

item.title: Grand Rapids Could Become a Boomtown as Investment Money Pours In
item.description: Looking for an affordable, cash-flowing market earmarked for major development and a projected population and economic surge? Grand Rapids, Michigan, ...

item.title: Search for Nancy Guthrie now seeks nearby security videos from the month before she vanished
Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website
item.description: Emails published by the Justice Department revealed cybersecurity veteran Vincenzo Iozzo emailed, and arranged to meet, Jeffrey Epstein multiple times...

item.title: Buying (and Building) Houses Could Get a LOT Easier (New Bill)
item.description: This could be the most important shift in the housing market in years. Something truly remarkable just happened that will impact almost every facet of...

item.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
item.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

item.title: Border czar hails a ‘safer’ Minnesota as he says the state’s immigration crackdown is over
item.description: The Trump administration says it is ending its massive immigration crackdown in Minnesota after weeks of angry mass protests, thousands of arrests and...

item.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
item.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

item.title: Musk needed a new vision for SpaceX and xAI. He landed on Moonbase Alpha.
item.description: "I really want to see a mass driver on the moon that is shooting AI satellites into deep space."

item.title: Grieving families press Congress on aviation safety reforms after midair collision near DC

item.description: For most of us, the frenzied bidding wars and constant price hikes of the post-pandemic housing boom are recent memories. That’s why it might come as ...

item.title: The 2026 Value-Add Real Estate Playbook (30% – 50% ROIs)
item.description: What if you could create home equity and cash flow out of nothing? It’s not magic. We’ve done it hundreds of times, and most real estate investors sti...

item.title: 3 Reasons Why You Haven’t Bought Your First Rental Property (Yet)
item.description: If you’re like most rookies, you probably won’t buy a rental property in 2026. After all, there are too many things working against you: high mortgage...
